result: Successfully cleaned and harmonized the deprivation score dataset. Output file created at data/output/cleaned_data.csv with 14105 observations and 4 variables (NSID, imd15, imd16, imd32). Missing value codes harmonized: -94 recoded to -8 (Insufficient Information), NA values recoded to -3 (Not asked). All three age-specific IMD variables retained as numeric continuous variables with appropriate labels.
